text:
……べ、別に
攻略法はわかったけどオレにできるかな
とか思ってねーよ！

見てろよ、今度はオレが
完璧に決めてやっから！
今日は腹痛ぇからまた改めてな！

とりあえず、今回はお疲れさん。
んじゃまたな。

Hey! Don't go thinkin' I'm nervous about
whether I can pull off that strategy you
showed me. That's not what I'm thinkin' at all!

You watch, I'm gonna take that thing down
like a pro! Just not today, 'cause my belly
hurts somethin' fierce.
Anyway, ya did good, pal. See ya.
